calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Petitioner Jose T. Ponce present in pro per with Witness Mr. M. OZ. Respondent Sean Dullea present in pro per.
Parties and Witness were sworn and direct examined.

the Petitioner's order was Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the following protected persons: Raymond Hadley, and is to stay 3 yards away from Raymond Hadley while at 149 Mason Street, San Francisco.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Attack, Strike, Stalk, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Harass, Destroy The Personal Property Of, Or Disturb The Peace Of The Person.
The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, Petiioner's request for issuance of a restraining order is GRANTED as follows:
Respondent shall not Contact the person, either directly or indirectly, in any way, including, but not limited to, in person, by telephone, in writing, by public or private mail, by interoffice mail, by e-mail, by text message, by fax, or by other electronic means.
Take any action to obtain the person's address or location.
Stay-away 50 yards from the Petitioner and stay-away a minimum of 5 yards from his home and yards while the petitioner is inside his home or his yards.
No Guns or Other Firearms.
Expires: 3 years.
Order signed in open court.
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7707. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
